{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query asks about a TCA intermediate used in heme synthesis. Reviewing the documents, Document [31] (Title: Biochemistry, Heme Synthesis -- Cellular Level) states 'Heme biosynthesis starts in mitochondria with the condensation of succinyl Co-A from the citric acid cycle and an amino acid glycine.'
